text: Lost about two hours of progress after the game crashed during a save.
Game crashed on save and I lost a couple hours of progress.
My save didn't load this morning, got dropped back to an old checkpoint.
Loaded in today and my save was reset to a much earlier point.
Second time this week my save file reset itself, losing a whole evening of play.
Save wiped again, that's twice now, an entire evening of progress gone.
Cloud sync overwrote my newer save and my progress is gone.
Third time now my entire campaign save has vanished, I'm losing days of progress.
For the third time my whole campaign save is gone. Days of progress lost, this is unacceptable.
All my characters and progress were wiped after the latest patch, completely gone.
Post-patch my progress is fully reset, characters gone, starting from zero.
Refunding — lost all my save progress twice and support hasn't restored it.
The new sniper is way overtuned, it dominates every match right now.
Matchmaking keeps putting me against players ten levels above me.
Frame rate tanks hard in the swamp zone on my machine.
The battle pass price went up again and the rewards feel worse.
Absolutely love the new soundtrack, the boss theme is incredible.
UI menus are confusing, took me ages to find the loadout screen.
Ran out of endgame content after a week, need more to grind for.
Voice chat is full of toxic players and there's no easy mute.
Audio cuts out completely whenever I open the map.
Netcode feels laggy in ranked, hits don't register half the time.
Great game overall but the tutorial is way too long.
The new map is gorgeous, best environment art so far.
Please add colorblind options, the objective markers are hard to see.
Purchased the deluxe skin bundle but only half of it unlocked.
Balance patch made my favorite class useless, kind of bummed.
Matchmaking wait times are really long during off-peak hours.
Loving the seasonal event, the cosmetics are fantastic this time.
Game stutters every time an ability effect plays, needs optimization.
